title: crotalaria ochroleuca
intro: Crotalaria ochroleuca, also known as the yellow fountain bush, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria ochroleuca include infusions, decoctions, and powders, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
